title: polygala senega
intro: Polygala senega, also known as Senega or Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The roots of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making them a treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senega include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing coughs. Senega can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
